title: CC narrative review S01 panel a4

payload.notes:
CC NARRATIVE reviewer, S01 (cover/setup origin panel for P00_cover), mode=baked. Story-only judgment.

BEAT FIDELITY = 5. S01's job is the film's opening premise: exhausted lone researcher, 24h to deadline, a failed run, and the seed of the ARIS duo's world. The rendered panel at /Users/yangruofeng/Desktop/aris-movie-director/examples/comic_m3_audit/panels/S01_panel_a04.png lands every required beat — the worn-out researcher at her desk, the dark terminal showing the structured-decoding RUN FAILED / exit code: 1 on dllm-schema-keyword-first, the DDL T-24:00:00 countdown made literal, the 0 / 512 stalled progress, and the LLM DECODING / ML RESEARCH framing that previews the ARIS duo's domain. The retry's TODO checklist (better masks / schema locks open, evals checked) reads as the unsolved thread left hanging into the next beat. Origin-panel premise fully established.

COMPOSITION (STORY) = 4/5. Reading order works (researcher → dark failed-run terminal → DDL chip → TODO/topic seed), but the lower terminal + caption region is still a touch dense and competes with the figure for first read; docked one point for that crowding, same as a03. Visual identity-lock / artifact severity / baked-text legibility / content-corruption are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
